case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. HOSSIEN C KOCH et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT KOCH, HOSSIEN C
